name: Double Chocolate (Triple Even!) Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and press the butter, crushed chocolate cookie wafers, and mint extract into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a bowl, mix warmed cream cheese, melted semi-sweet chocolate, sugar, cornstarch, vanilla, and warm jumbo eggs for 30 seconds in the microwave.
4. Pour the filling over the crust.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until set.
6. Let cool completely before serving.
